SEARCH

Uses of Package
neqsim.process.safety.compliance

Packages that use neqsim.process.safety.compliance
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.compliance
NORSOK and Equinor compliance gates for process design results.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.safety.compliance used by neqsim.process.safety.compliance
    Class
    Description
    NorsokP002ComplianceChecker
    NORSOK P-002 ("Process system design") compliance checker.
    P002Criterion
    NORSOK P-002 ("Process system design") compliance criteria.
    P002Finding
    Single finding from a NorsokP002ComplianceChecker.
    StandardsComplianceReport
    Standards Compliance Report — produces an auditable checklist of mandatory requirements from the major process-safety standards and tracks the project's compliance status.
    StandardsComplianceReport.Requirement
    One requirement / clause record.
    StandardsComplianceReport.Status
    Compliance status of a single requirement.
    Sts0131Gate
    Generalised STS-0131 acceptance gate.
    Sts0131Gate.Finding
    A single STS-0131 finding.
    Sts0131Gate.Severity
    Severity of an STS-0131 finding.
